title: Bounded Prefetch, Worker Ownership, Ordering, and Backpressure · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Pipeline Stress Tests
summary: Every map result launches a goroutine, concurrency is unbounded, jobs block after cancellation, output follows completion order, and prefetched failures poison visible state. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go pipeline stress tests increment in bounded cancellable Pokemon prefetch pipeline. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Use blocked workers, tiny queues, cancellation, duplicate jobs, partial failures, and race or leak evidence under deterministic fixtures.
Preserve requested order or label completion order, isolate per-item failure, and never commit speculative visible state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only.
